findings.location: s2 — codeSelectタグ, codeRadioButtonsタグ, codeCheckboxesタグ
findings.description: The filtering mechanism for code selection tags is missing. The source JSP comments explain that: (1) `codeId` specifies the ID to look up in CODE_NAME table, and (2) `pattern` specifies a column name in CODE_PATTERN table, and only rows where that column's value = 1 are included in the selection list. This logic is documented identically for all three tags' JSP comments in the source but is absent from the knowledge file. Without it, a developer cannot understand what the `pattern` attribute does.
findings.source_evidence: JSP comment in codeSelectタグ section: 「CODE_NAMEテーブルの中で、以下の条件を満たすIDを持つ行から、選択項目リストを作成する。1. codeId属性で指定したID 2. CODE_PATTERNテーブルのうち、pattern属性で指定したカラム名の値が1」 (same text appears in codeRadioButtonsタグ and codeCheckboxesタグ JSP comments)

findings.location: s2 — コード値の表示方法
findings.description: Section s2 combines the entire コード値の表示方法 content (well over 2000 characters) which contains four distinct h3-level subsections in the source: codeSelectタグ, codeRadioButtonsタグ, codeCheckboxesタグ, and codeCheckboxタグ. Per V3 rules, an h2 with >= 2000 chars of plain text that has h3 children should be split into separate sections.
findings.source_evidence: Source RST h3 sections under コード値の表示方法: 「codeSelectタグ」(====), 「codeRadioButtonsタグ」(====), 「codeCheckboxesタグ」(====), 「codeCheckboxタグ」(====)
